title: Visual Distinctions (for Mapmakers)
description: Allows you to distinguish between several types of blocks that all look identical in Vanilla.
body:
This pack is intended for anyone who wants to easily distinguish any block from any other block, even those that normally look indistinguishable in Vanilla.

Primarily intended for mapmakers looking to see every tiny detail of their maps... but it could also totally be used in survival to cheat and see where all the silverfish are hiding.

[Featured on YT](https://youtu.be/5rXrho7TYEw)
